title: Smoky Flavored German Peanut Butter Gratin
description: A rich and creamy German dish featuring peanut butter, topped with a smoky cheese crust, perfect for a date-night dinner.

ingredients.name: Gruy�18re Cheese
ingredients.notes: Shaved or grated cheese yields best results.

instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine heavy cream, gruy�18re cheese, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper. Heat over low, stirring constantly, until cheese melts and sauce is smooth.
Stir in peanut butter until well combined.
Add honey and mix until incorporated.
In a greased 8x8 inch baking dish, spread the peanut butter mixture evenly.
Dot the top with unsalted butter.
Sprinkle with parsley and thyme for a pop of color.
Place under broiler for 2-3 minutes, or until top is golden brown and sauce is bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Increase oven temperature to broil. Sprinkle a thin layer of grated gruy�18re cheese over the top of the dish.
Place under broiler for an additional 30-60 seconds, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional parsley and serve hot.
Be careful when removing from oven, as the cheese will be hot and may pull away from the dish.
This dish is also perfect for a weeknight dinner, as it can be prepared in under an hour.
It's also a great option for a special occasion, as it's sure to impress your guests with its rich flavor and presentation.
